programme.desc: Kevin and Roli make an unplanned stop to check out a mysteriously small vehicle; Danny gets a call from Rob Zombie who wants to customize a truck for his upcoming tour.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Mark makes plans to direct a video to help take Johnny Drama's music career to the next level, and enlists rapper P. Diddy and Hollywood director Peter Berg to serve as mentors.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Wahlburgers takes on local rival Tasty Burger in a game of softball at Fenway Park, the historic home of baseball's Boston Red Sox; Alma volunteers to manage the team, but Mark soon decides to take charge.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Mark hosts an NBA All-Star weekend party at their newest addition, Wahlburgers-Sunset; a new technology allows the brothers to virtually pop up at any Wahlburgers location from anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: In a no-holds-barred romp down memory lane, Mark, Donnie, Paul, and Alma recall the most hilarious moments over the last nine seasons of the series, "Wahlburgers.".

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: The Boston-Pittsburgh sports rivalries present a unique challenge and Paul has to venture outside of his comfort zone to tackle the issue before it becomes a bigger problem; Paul and Donnie fly out to try to build a bridge with the community.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: A freak ice storm threatens to derail the VIP party celebrating the opening of the newest Wahlburgers in Taylor, Mich.; after many months of being closed, Donnie makes it his personal mission to reopen the Coney Island Wahlburgers.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul and Drama drive the food truck to Mark's dealership in Columbus, Ohio, then they turn around and return to Boston to tailgate at a New England Patriots game with former Super Bowl Champions Matt Light and Troy Brown.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Donnie breaks ground on his St. Charles, Ill., location; Alma, Johnny Drama and Phyllis plan a '50s-themed carhop behind Paul's back; Brandon gets into the dog food market with the help of Paul and Alma's dogs.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.sub-title: A Tale of Two Sin Cities
programme.desc: Paul gets a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to fly with the Air Force's Thunderbirds in Las Vegas; Brandon tags along and bets Paul that he'll have a better Vegas experience on the strip; Bob gets more involved in the company.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul visits the Lone Star State and gets the full cowboy experience as he explores a possible Austin location; Alma and Phyllis help Brandon get his dating life on track; Paul puts his body on the line to learn a new skill.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul visits a beef distributor in Amsterdam in preparation for a possible military base location in Germany, while Nino tries to distract him with playing tourist the entire time; Paul ends up with some special new footwear.

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Paul visits a military base in Germany to decide whether or not it's a good fit for a Wahlburgers location; Alma and Phyllis work up a sweat as they take part in a community event with former Boston Celtics players Dana Barros and Leon Powe.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Mediterranean Charred Chicken Salad With Scallion Pesto
programme.desc: Rachael shows a new take on traditional pesto sauce with a base of herbs and charred onions, that pairs with a Mediterranean chicken salad.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a white, quick cooking Ragù sauce that she serves over ribbony pappardelle pasta, cooked al dente style.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Spaghetti With Semi-Dried Tomato Pesto & Broccolini
programme.desc: Rachael demonstrates how to use semi-dried tomatoes, a fairly new staple in American grocery stores, as the star in her recipe for a pesto that's paired with broccolini and served with sausage.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Spicy Charred Tomato Pasta With Hot Sausage or Chickpeas
programme.desc: Rachael spices up a charred tomato sauce in pasta dinner in two ways, in minutes; in one dish, she serves the pasta over sausage and in the other dish she pairs the pasta with chickpeas that are seasoned for heat.

programme.title: Cookie Cupcake Cake
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Samantha Seneviratne task the four bakers to rewind time and create retro-themed delights.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Que Pasta: Mexican Street Corn Pasta
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to take grilled corn on the cob to a whole new level by combining it with spicy chili, cotija cheese, and more with her recipe for Mexican street corn pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Some Like It Hot: Deviled Popcorn Chicken With Fiery Cheese Popcorn and Ranch Dipper
programme.desc: Rachael prepares deviled popcorn chicken with a fiery cheese popcorn and ranch dip.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Mediterranean Charred Chicken Salad With Scallion Pesto
programme.desc: Rachael shows a new take on traditional pesto sauce with a base of herbs and charred onions, that pairs with a Mediterranean chicken salad.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a white, quick cooking Ragù sauce that she serves over ribbony pappardelle pasta, cooked al dente style.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Spaghetti With Semi-Dried Tomato Pesto & Broccolini
programme.desc: Rachael demonstrates how to use semi-dried tomatoes, a fairly new staple in American grocery stores, as the star in her recipe for a pesto that's paired with broccolini and served with sausage.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Spicy Charred Tomato Pasta With Hot Sausage or Chickpeas
programme.desc: Rachael spices up a charred tomato sauce in pasta dinner in two ways, in minutes; in one dish, she serves the pasta over sausage and in the other dish she pairs the pasta with chickpeas that are seasoned for heat.

programme.title: Cookie Cupcake Cake
programme.desc: Buddy Valastro and Samantha Seneviratne task the four bakers to rewind time and create retro-themed delights.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Que Pasta: Mexican Street Corn Pasta
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to take grilled corn on the cob to a whole new level by combining it with spicy chili, cotija cheese, and more with her recipe for Mexican street corn pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Some Like It Hot: Deviled Popcorn Chicken With Fiery Cheese Popcorn and Ranch Dipper

programme.title: Wahlburgers
programme.desc: Mark makes plans to direct a video to help take Johnny Drama's music career to the next level, and enlists rapper P. Diddy and Hollywood director Peter Berg to serve as mentors.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Morgan's land fails to provide for him, leaving him locked in a life-or-death battle with hunger; Tom's bad luck continues into a new season; Rich takes a bruising fall.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom calls in reinforcements to bail him out; Morgan fights for survival in the deep freeze, and a father gambles everything for his family's future.

programme.desc: Tom and Nancy divide and conquer to get ahead; Eustace makes a breakthrough with his lumber business; Morgan's luck turns around.

programme.desc: Faced with a hard truth, Tom does the unthinkable; Morgan embarks on a do-or-die hunt in the high peaks; Marty finds competition on the line.

programme.desc: Tom takes on the Snake; Marty's new opportunity goes up in smoke; Eustace takes a hard fall that puts him out of commission.
